title: Parent Support Groups * Perinatal Depression - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Parenting & Childcare > Parent Support Groups * Perinatal Depression 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Autism Spectrum Disorder Disabilities Issues Hispanic/Latino Community Mothers Perinatal Depression Substance Use Disorder Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BABY BLUES CONNECTION PREGNANCY AND POSTPARTUM SUPPORT RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health support for parents and birthing people coping with perinatal mood and anxiety disorders through connection, information and resources. Services include 24-hour phone support, parent to parent support groups online and in-person and partner support for family members who want to support someone coping with postpartum depression or anxiety. Resource packets may be emailed or mailed at no cost. PO Box 33128 Portland, OR 97292 Eligibility: Parents experiencing any kind of perinatal mood disorders and stress related to welcoming a new child, and their family members. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 557-8375 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BABY BLUES CONNECTION PREGNANCY AND POSTPARTUM SUPPORT RESOURCES
